assertions.description: CHECK_NEEDS_FIX: The 6-component relay board (3x JSM1-12V-5, 1x LED, 1x resistor, 1x connector) is correctly classified. The power_rails list contains only GND, which is accurate: the 12V and 12V_SW1 nets are local labels, not power symbols — there are 7 GND power symbols but no 12V power symbol in the schematic. The relay type detection is correct. The ERC warning about net SW having no driver is a valid observation (SW is an input label driven by external connector).
